debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
h_not_same : u ≠ v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor_cfd : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
rightSide : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z }) := ⋯
allChildren : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) := ⋯
u_comp✝ : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
var_len_1 : (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len = 1
pre_len_less_u_len : dstep.pre.len < u.len
u_comp : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
suf_len_less_u_len : dstep.suf.len < u.len
leftOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⋯
rightOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⋯
rhs_symbol_count : ℕ := ⋯
u'_eq_result : dstep.result = u'
n : ℕ
h_num_vars_rhs : (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len = n + 1
h_rhs_non_empty : 1 ≤ (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
h_u_vs_u'_len : u'.len = u.len + (rhs_symbol_count - 1)
h_u_vs_u'_len₂ : u.len ≤ u'.len
u_range_subset_u'_range : Finset.range u.len ⊆ Finset.range u'.len
leftOfVarCount₂ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } := ⋯
index₁ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
h_index_valid : ∃ location ∈ allChildren, location.2 = index₁
afunc : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) →
  G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } → List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) := ⋯
afuncDef :
  afunc = fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
a : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) := ⋯
aDef : a = List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
afunc_monotone :
  ∀ (list₁ list₂ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })),
    list₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc list₁ list₂ ≠ []
head : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
ind_hyp : List.foldl afunc [] tail = [] ↔ ¬∃ location ∈ tail, location.2 = index₁
⊢ (¬∃ location ∈ head :: tail, location.2 = index₁) → List.foldl afunc [] (head :: tail) = []

proof:
intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  simp only [afuncDef]
                  rw [dif_neg (by intro e; apply h; exists head; simp [e])]
                  rw [ind_hyp]
                  intro ⟨l, hl, he⟩
                  exact h ⟨l, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hl, he⟩
failed_attempts:
intro h_not_exists
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  simp [afuncDef]
                  by_cases h_eq : index₁ = head.2
                  · exfalso; apply h_not_exists; exists head; simp [h_eq]
                  · simp [h_eq]
                    rw [ind_hyp]
                    intro ⟨x, hx, heq⟩
                    apply h_not_exists
                    exists x
                    simp [hx, heq]

intro h_not_exists
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  have : index₁ ≠ head.2 := fun e => h_not_exists ⟨head, List.mem_cons_self _ _, e.symm⟩
                  rw [afuncDef]; dsimp; rw [dif_neg this]
                  rw [ind_hyp]
                  intro ⟨x, m, e⟩
                  exact h_not_exists ⟨x, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ m, e⟩

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  have h_neq : index₁ ≠ head.2 := by
                    intro h_eq
                    apply h
                    exists head
                    constructor
                    · exact List.mem_cons_self _ _
                    · symm; exact h_eq
                  rw [afuncDef]
                  dsimp
                  rw [dif_neg h_neq]
                  apply ind_hyp.mpr
                  intro ⟨loc, h_mem, h_eq⟩
                  apply h
                  exists loc
                  constructor
                  · exact List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_mem
                  · exact h_eq

intro h_not_exists
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  simp
                  simp at h_not_exists
                  by_cases h_eq : index₁ = head.2
                  · exfalso; apply h_not_exists.1; symm; exact h_eq
                  · rw [dif_neg h_eq]
                    apply ind_hyp.mpr
                    exact h_not_exists.2)

intro h
                  simp at h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  dsimp
                  rw [dif_neg (Ne.symm h.1)]
                  rw [ind_hyp]
                  exact h.2

intro h
                  simp at h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  dsimp
                  rw [dif_neg (Ne.symm h.1)]
                  exact ind_hyp.mpr h.2

intro h
                  simp at h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  simp
                  rw [dif_neg (Ne.symm h.1)]
                  exact ind_hyp.mpr h.2

intro h_not_exists
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  simp
                  by_cases h_head : index₁ = head.2
                  · exfalso
                    apply h_not_exists
                    exists head
                    exact ⟨List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_head.symm⟩
                  · simp [h_head]
                    apply ind_hyp.mpr
                    intro ⟨loc, h_mem, h_eq⟩
                    apply h_not_exists
                    exists loc
                    exact ⟨List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_mem, h_eq⟩

intro h_not_exists
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  simp only
                  have h_neq : index₁ ≠ head.2 := fun h_eq => h_not_exists ⟨head, List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_eq.symm⟩
                  rw [if_neg h_neq, ind_hyp]
                  exact fun ⟨loc, h_in, h_eq⟩ => h_not_exists ⟨loc, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_in, h_eq⟩

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  simp at h
                  rw [afuncDef]
                  dsimp
                  rw [dif_neg]
                  · rw [ind_hyp]
                    exact h.2
                  · exact ne_comm.mp h.1

intro h_not_exists
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  simp only [afuncDef]
                  by_cases h_eq : index₁ = head.2
                  · exfalso
                    apply h_not_exists
                    exists head
                    simp [h_eq.symm]
                  · rw [if_neg h_eq]
                    rw [ind_hyp]
                    intro ⟨loc, h_mem, h_val⟩
                    apply h_not_exists
                    exists loc
                    simp [List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_mem, h_val]

intro h_none
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  have h_head : afunc [] head = [] := by
                    rw [afuncDef]
                    dsimp
                    split
                    · next h_eq =>
                      exfalso
                      apply h_none
                      exists head
                      simp [h_eq]
                    · rfl
                  rw [h_head]
                  rw [ind_hyp]
                  intro ⟨loc, h_loc_in, h_loc_eq⟩
                  apply h_none
                  exists loc
                  simp [List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_loc_in, h_loc_eq])

intro h_not_exists
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  simp
                  rw [dif_neg]
                  · rw [ind_hyp]
                    intro ⟨loc, h_mem, h_eq⟩
                    apply h_not_exists
                    exists loc
                    exact ⟨List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_mem, h_eq⟩
                  · intro h_eq
                    apply h_not_exists
                    exists head
                    exact ⟨List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_eq.symm⟩

intro h_not_exists
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  simp [afuncDef]
                  match h_head : head with
                  | (dt, idx) =>
                    simp only [h_head]
                    split
                    case isTrue h_eq =>
                      exfalso
                      apply h_not_exists
                      exists head
                      simp [h_head, h_eq.symm]
                    case isFalse h_neq =>
                      rw [ind_hyp]
                      intro ⟨loc, h_mem, h_eq⟩
                      apply h_not_exists
                      exists loc
                      constructor
                      · exact List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_mem
                      · exact h_eq

intro h
                  simp at h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  simp [afuncDef]
                  rw [dif_neg (Ne.symm h.1)]
                  rw [ind_hyp]
                  exact h.2

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  simp only [afuncDef]
                  split
                  · next heq =>
                    exfalso
                    apply h
                    exists head
                    exact ⟨List.mem_cons_self _ _, heq.symm⟩
                  · rw [ind_hyp]
                    intro ⟨loc, hmem, heq⟩
                    apply h
                    exists loc
                    exact ⟨List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hmem, heq⟩

intro h_not_exists
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  simp
                  by_cases h_eq : index₁ = head.2
                  · rw [dif_pos h_eq]
                    exfalso
                    apply h_not_exists
                    exists head
                    simp [h_eq.symm]
                  · rw [dif_neg h_eq]
                    rw [ind_hyp]
                    intro ⟨loc, h_mem, h_val⟩
                    apply h_not_exists
                    exists loc
                    simp [h_mem, h_val]

intro h_not_in
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  simp only [afuncDef]
                  have h_neq : index₁ ≠ head.2 := fun h_eq => h_not_in ⟨head, List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_eq.symm⟩
                  rw [dif_neg h_neq]
                  rw [ind_hyp]
                  intro ⟨x, hx_mem, hx_eq⟩
                  exact h_not_in ⟨x, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hx_mem, hx_eq⟩

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  simp
                  split_ifs with heq
                  · exfalso
                    apply h
                    exists head
                    simp [heq]
                  · apply ind_hyp.mpr
                    simpa using h

intro h
                  simp at h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  simp
                  rw [dif_neg (Ne.symm h.1)]
                  rw [ind_hyp]
                  exact h.2

intro h_not
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  dsimp
                  rw [dif_neg (fun h_eq => h_not ⟨head, List.mem_cons_self head tail, h_eq.symm⟩)]
                  rw [ind_hyp]
                  intro ⟨loc, h_in, h_eq⟩
                  apply h_not
                  exists loc
                  exact ⟨List.mem_cons_of_mem head h_in, h_eq⟩

intro h_not_exists
                  simp at h_not_exists
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  simp
                  split_ifs with h_eq
                  · exfalso
                    apply h_not_exists.left
                    symm
                    exact h_eq
                  · rw [ind_hyp]
                    exact h_not_exists.right

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  have h_afunc : afunc [] head = [] := by
                    simp [afuncDef]
                    by_cases h_eq : index₁ = head.2
                    case pos =>
                      rw [dif_pos h_eq]
                      exfalso
                      apply h
                      exists head
                      simp [h_eq]
                    case neg =>
                      rw [dif_neg h_eq]
                  rw [h_afunc]
                  rw [ind_hyp]
                  intro ⟨x, hx, heq⟩
                  apply h
                  exists x
                  simp [hx, heq]

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  have : afunc [] head = [] := by
                    rw [afuncDef]
                    simp
                    split <;> intro h_cond
                    · exfalso; apply h; exists head; simp [h_cond.symm]
                    · rfl
                  rw [this]
                  rw [ind_hyp]
                  intro ⟨loc, h_in, h_eq⟩
                  apply h
                  exists loc
                  constructor
                  · apply List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_in
                  · exact h_eq

intro h_not_exists
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  simp at h_not_exists
                  rw [afuncDef]
                  dsimp
                  rw [dif_neg (Ne.symm h_not_exists.1)]
                  apply ind_hyp.mpr h_not_exists.2

intro h
                  simp at h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  simp [afuncDef]
                  by_cases h_eq : index₁ = head.2
                  · simp [h_eq] at h; contradiction
                  · rw [dif_neg h_eq]
                    rw [ind_hyp]
                    exact h.2

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl]
                  simp at h
                  simp [afuncDef]
                  rw [dif_neg (Ne.symm h.1)]
                  rwa [ind_hyp]

intro h_not_exists
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  simp [afuncDef]
                  have h_neq : index₁ ≠ head.2 := fun h_eq => h_not_exists ⟨head, by simp [h_eq]⟩
                  simp [h_neq]
                  rw [ind_hyp]
                  intro ⟨loc, h_mem, h_eq⟩
                  apply h_not_exists
                  exists loc
                  simp [h_mem, h_eq]

intro h_not_exists
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  have h_afunc_eval : afunc [] head = [] := by
                    simp [afuncDef]
                    split
                    · exfalso; apply h_not_exists; exists head; simp [*]
                    · rfl
                  rw [h_afunc_eval]
                  apply ind_hyp.mpr
                  intro ⟨x, hx, heq⟩
                  apply h_not_exists; exists x; simp [hx, heq]

intro h
                  simp at h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  simp [afuncDef]
                  rw [dif_neg h.1.symm]
                  rw [ind_hyp]
                  exact h.2
successful_attempts:
intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  simp only [afuncDef]
                  rw [dif_neg (by intro e; apply h; exists head; simp [e])]
                  rw [ind_hyp]
                  intro ⟨l, hl, he⟩
                  exact h ⟨l, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hl, he⟩

intro h_not_exists
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  simp only
                  rw [dif_neg (by intro h_eq; apply h_not_exists; exists head; simp [h_eq])]
                  rw [ind_hyp]
                  intro h_tail_exists
                  apply h_not_exists
                  obtain ⟨loc, h_mem, h_eq⟩ := h_tail_exists
                  exists loc
                  simp [h_mem, h_eq]
